channel.title: Red Light Therapy on PepsFeeder
channel.description: Recent content in Red Light Therapy on PepsFeeder

item.title: Illuminate Your Health: Red Light Therapy Simplified
item.author: support@pepsfeeder.com (Chris Mano)
item.description: Could there be a way to use light for healing rather than harming? It might seem surreal, like something from a science fiction flick, but Red Light Therapy (RLT)-technically referred to as photobiomodulation-is a very real breakthrough.
